implementation_phase.objective: Enhance the existing dashboard-reporter.ts to export structured failure context as local JSON files for immediate Claude Code consumption. This adds ~30 lines to the existing reporter with zero impact on test execution.

current_capabilities.capability: Captures test results with logs, errors, artifacts
Sends payload to dashboard API on completion

output_specification.json_structure: { "test_id": "negotiations/invite-to-case-Att-Att.spec.ts::should complete flow", "timestamp": "2024-01-15T14:30:45.123Z", "file": "automation/playwright/tests/negotiations/invite-to-case-Att-Att.spec.ts", "suite": ["negotiations", "invite-to-case-Att-Att"], "test": "should complete full attorney-to-attorney invite flow", "error": { "message": "Timeout 30000ms exceeded waiting for selector '[data-testid=\"accept-button\"]'", "type": "TimeoutError", "location": "invite-to-case-Att-Att.spec.ts:142:15" }, "steps": [ "Login as attorney1", "Navigate to case page", "Click invite button", "Select attorney from list", "Waiting for accept button" ], "last_step": "Waiting for accept button", "duration_ms": 45230, "retries": 0, "last_api": { "method": "POST", "url": "/graphql", "status": 200, "operation": "InviteAttorneyToCase" }, "page_url": "https://app.attorneyshare.info/case/abc123", "browser": "chromium", "logs": [ { "timestamp": 1234, "level": "info", "source": "test:invite", "message": "Starting invite flow" }, { "timestamp": 5678, "level": "error", "source": "test:invite", "message": "Accept button not found" } ], "execution": { "run_id": "12345678", "branch": "feature/ENG-123", "commit_sha": "abc123def" } }

step.title: Add Helper Function to Build AI Context
Add Local JSON Export in onTestEnd
step.location: After collecting test result data, before pushing to results array

step.title: Add exportLocalJson Method
Update TestResultPayload Interface
Add .gitignore Entry
step.code: # AI failure context files (generated, not committed) ai-failures/

testing.test_locally:
# Run a test that will fail (or modify one temporarily) cd attorney_share_mvp_web FRONTEND_URL=https://app.attorneyshare.info \ BACKEND_URL=https://api.attorneyshare.info \ npx playwright test automation/playwright/tests/signin/signin.spec.ts --reporter=./automation/playwright/reporters/dashboard-reporter.ts
# Check for generated files ls -la automation/playwright/ai-failures/
# Inspect a generated file cat automation/playwright/ai-failures/*.json | jq .

verify_output.check: JSON file created in ai-failures/ directory
JSON contains steps array with test steps
Test execution not affected by JSON export

implementation_phase.rollback:
# To rollback, simply revert the changes to dashboard-reporter.ts git checkout automation/playwright/reporters/dashboard-reporter.ts
# Remove generated files rm -rf automation/playwright/ai-failures/

success_criteria.criterion: Failed tests generate JSON files in ai-failures/
Passed tests do NOT generate JSON files
Errors in JSON export are caught and logged, not thrown

implementation_phase.next_phase: Proceed to Phase 3 to update the E2E Test Dashboard to receive and store the ai_context field in the database.
